case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. FESMONT FREIGHT & LOGISTICS INTERNATIONAL LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-12-2023 CONTINUED TO MAR-12-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100223496), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. SERVED AUG-22-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION, MAILING DATE AUG-23-2023 AS TO DEFENDANT FESMONT FREIGHT & LOGISTICS INTERNATIONAL LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FESMONT FREIGHT & LOGISTICS INTERNATIONAL LLC $13,696.31 PRINCIPAL, $1,700.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $669.45 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,065.76, SEE SCANNED DOC
